title: Patterns in the Ash
description: Multiple clue types constrain the world. Identify the sign of the target colour aspect.

hints.text: Determine the R sign of ing7. There are 4 alchemicals still consistent with the clues for slot 7. Check whether they all agree on the R sign.
Remaining alchemicals for ing7: pnP(R+), pNn(R+), Ppn(R+), PPP(R+). All share R+.
